name: Hot Horseradish Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the grated horseradish into a small earthen cooking vessel.
2. Add the flour, salt, paprika and butter to the horseradish.
3. Pour in the cream and stir until thick and smooth.
4. Cook on low heat, stirring constantly.
5. Move the sauce to the back of the stove.
6. Add the egg yolk and stir rapidly.
7. Cook for 30 seconds.
8. Serve immediately. This sauce can be eaten as a relish with hot roast or boiled beef.
Source: Pennsylvania Dutch Cook Book - Fine Old Recipes, Culinary Arts Press, 1936.
